scripts.test:runtime: sh -c 'PY=.venv/bin/python; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY=python3; "$PY" -m pytest tests/test_elyan_phase2.py tests/test_faz7_memory.py tests/voice/ tests/unit/ -q --tb=short'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:desktop && pnpm run typecheck:web
scripts.test: pnpm run test:runtime && pnpm run test:web
scripts.build: pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run build:web
scripts.lint: sh -c 'PY=.venv/bin/python; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY=python3; "$PY" -m compileall core cli config security tools utils elyan main.py elyan_entrypoint.py scripts'
scripts.lint:runtime: sh -c 'PY=.venv/bin/python; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY=python3; "$PY" -m compileall core cli config security tools utils elyan main.py elyan_entrypoint.py scripts'
